violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee observed washing hands in a prep sink.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator in the kitchen was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Protiens temped between 45F - 48F. All items in fridge were ice bathed and placed in walk in cooler.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Clean the wall by the fryer.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. There was no hand washing sink located in the back kitchen area. The only hand sink provided is through the door in the front of the store.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
